_meta: OUR own synthesized/captured cab IRs that OVERRIDE the Rocksmith-extracted mic-position table. One entry per cab gear key. For each mic suffix in rs_cab_mic_map.json, the matching OUR IR is derived from the authoritative Wwise effect_name (Cab_<model>_<mic>_<pos>) as <ir_dir>/<prefix>_<mic>_<pos>.wav  (mic: 57->dyn, Condenser->cond, Ribbon->ribbon; pos lower-cased: cone/edge/offaxis). These ship WITH the plugin under nam_irs/<ir_dir>/, so the UI marks them always-available, they get the +18dB convolution makeup via _is_synth_cab_ir, and they are exempt from 'bypass all Rocksmith cabs'. See routes._load_cab_overrides / _override_variant.

Cab_MARSHALL1960A.source: AmpliTube 5 Marshall 1960A captures (user-chosen mic positions), deconvolved + min-phase resynthesized to original distributable filters

Cab_TW112C.source: AmpliTube 5 Fender Super-Sonic 1x12 captures (user-chosen mic positions), deconvolved + min-phase resynthesized to original distributable filters

Cab_TW410C.source: AmpliTube 5 Fender Bassman 4x10 captures (user-chosen mic positions), deconvolved + min-phase resynthesized to original distributable filters

Cab_TW110C.source: AmpliTube 5 Fender tweed Deluxe captures (user-chosen mic positions), deconvolved + min-phase resynthesized to original distributable filters

Cab_EN212C.source: Slopsmith-owned synthetic 2x12 open-back alnico cabinet IRs generated by tools/make_synthetic_alnico_cab_irs.py from a generic speaker/cab/mic response model; no captured/proprietary IR is read, analyzed, fitted, copied, or required.
